description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, elongated fuselage. The wings are swept back and integrated smoothly into the body, giving it a delta-like appearance with subtle curves and a low profile. The surface is predominantly black with metallic silver and gold accents, and there are visible engine components mounted at the rear, suggesting a high-performance propulsion system. The cockpit is centrally located near the front, with a small, green-tinted canopy that appears to be enclosed. The underside reveals complex mechanical details, including multiple engine exhausts and aerodynamic surfaces. The overall aesthetic is advanced and tactical, reminiscent of a stealth or sci-fi aircraft.
description: A sleek, black, futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, rear-mounted engines, and a green-tinted forward cockpit. Metallic silver and gold accents highlight its advanced, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, swept-back wings, and prominent rear engine assembly.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the delta-like wing shape, central cockpit, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engine and wing integration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the multiple engine exhausts, mechanical details, and the broad, angular wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept delta configuration with smoothly blended wing roots and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and integrated horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small, green-tinted canopy.
